scripts.kws:download-model: mkdir -p models && cd models && if [ ! -d sherpa-onnx-kws-zipformer-wenetspeech-3.3M-2024-01-01 ]; then curl -L -o sherpa-onnx-kws-zipformer-wenetspeech-3.3M-2024-01-01.tar.bz2 https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/kws-models/sherpa-onnx-kws-zipformer-wenetspeech-3.3M-2024-01-01.tar.bz2 && tar -xjf sherpa-onnx-kws-zipformer-wenetspeech-3.3M-2024-01-01.tar.bz2 && rm sherpa-onnx-kws-zipformer-wenetspeech-3.3M-2024-01-01.tar.bz2; fi
